{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Trees
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There are [[Trees]] that can be poorly defended during war efforts.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
